productDisplayName: Asics Men's Gel Phoenix 2 White Red Running Shoe
description: Unlike the Kayano which is plush and innovative, the asics Gel Phoenix 2 is stripped-down and basic. This new value shoe doesn't have the forefoot Gel and memory-foam interior accents of its higher-priced cousins, but the forefoot is absolutely soft and comfortable, resulting in a cushioned ride. A highly recommended trainer, this shoe works wonders for under pronators and overpronators.Upper Double meshed upper for maximum breathability Synthetic overlays for shoe structure and to provide ample support to the midfoot Symmetrical lace-up system for snug Fit and protection from blistering Synthetic laces for durability Plush padded and meshed tongue for ample ventilation and comfort Fabric lining for inner tongue for comfort feel Lightly padded sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Reinforced overlay above toe guard for enhanced durability and protection to the toes Midsole Coloured Solyte inserts in the midsole to offer gel comfort and cushioning, protecting the feet from impact Reinforced gel inserts in the transparent heel to enhance cushioning and shock absorption Added cushioning in the forefoot for comfortable and impact-protected ride ComforDry sockliner with anti-microbial properties to keep the feet safe from infection Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System to attenuate shock during impact phase and allow a smooth transition to midstance SpEVA Midsole material to improve bounce back characteristics and decrease midsole breakdown Reflective material to enhance visibility during low light hours DuoMax Support system enhances support and stability, and is positioned sport specifically Outsole Made of high quality, durable rubber Heel and forefoot are divided into two parts, and are connected by a Trusstic Unit asics High Abrasion Rubber (AHAR) placed in critical area of the outsole for exceptional durability Trusstic Unit shank doesn't touch the groun and enhances torsionability and stability, preventing the leg from twisting Decoupled heel with four individual pods to absorb shock effectively and spread it across the shoe Impact Guidance System (IGS) to spread shock across the foot and aid in better propulsion and energy return to the legs Outsole reinforced on the upper forefoot with a toe guard for enhanced shoe durability and protection to the forefoot Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
